name: Filet Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan and dust the beef with flour, shaking off any excess.
2. When the oil is hot, add the meat and onion to the pan.
3. Brown the meat until it is cooked through.
4. Add the pickle, mushrooms, and paprika to the pan.
5. Pour in the red wine and then the stock. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Stir in the sour cream and heat through.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve with Spaetzle.
